title: STUDENT NUTRITION AND ACTIVITY CLINIC FOR KIDS - 211info
text: WESTERN OREGON CENTER FOR PEDIATRIC THERAPEUTIC LIFESTYLE CHANGE STUDENT NUTRITION AND ACTIVITY CLINIC FOR KIDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides nutrition education and cooking classes for the community. Hosts wellness activities individuals can sign up for. 2435 NE Cumulus Avenue Suite A McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 434-8278 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (503) 434-8278 Snack Program Intake (503) 472-6161 Physicians Medical Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Cooking Classes Nutrition Education Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion Wellness Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
